name: Chocolate Upside-Down Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, stir together the flour, baking powder, and salt.
2. Add milk, melted margarine, and vanilla extract to the dry ingredients. Stir until just combined.
3. Pour the batter into a greased 8 x 8 inch baking pan.
4. Mix together brown sugar, granulated sugar, cocoa, and hot water in a separate bowl until it forms a thin syrup-like consistency.
5. Carefully pour the syrup over the batter in the pan, ensuring not to disturb the batter.
6. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 30 minutes.
7. Serve warm with whipped cream or ice cream, if desired. The top will resemble a cake, while the bottom will form a pudding-like texture. This recipe serves approximately 8 people.
